root_text.an5.303:1.3: Asubhasaññā, maraṇasaññā, ādīnavasaññā, āhāre paṭikūlasaññā, sabbaloke anabhiratasaññā—
root_text.an5.303:1.4: rāgassa, bhikkhave, abhiññāya ime pañca dhammā bhāvetabbā”ti.

translation_text.an5.303:1.1: “For insight into greed, five things should be developed.
translation_text.an5.303:1.3: The perceptions of ugliness, death, drawbacks, repulsiveness of food, and dissatisfaction with the whole world.
translation_text.an5.303:1.4: For insight into greed, these five things should be developed.”
